sentences.english: I can solve a Rubik's cube in under a minute.
sentences.korean: 루빅스 큐브를 1분 안에 풀 수 있어요.

sentences.english: People are always surprised when they see me do it.
sentences.korean: 사람들은 내가 하는 걸 보면 항상 놀라요.

sentences.english: I can whistle any song perfectly, but I never do it in public.
sentences.korean: 어떤 노래든 완벽하게 휘파람으로 할 수 있지만 공공장소에서는 절대 안 해요.

sentences.english: I'm really good at doing impressions of famous people.
My friends always ask me to do them at parties.
